title: excoecaria agallocha
intro: Excoecaria agallocha, also known as the milky nut or the toddy nut, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The milky nut has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Excoecaria agallocha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
